deep_dive.title: GazePrior: Zero-Shot AR/VR Eye Tracking via Learned 3D Gaze Reconstruction
deep_dive.abstract: Eye tracking (ET) is a foundational technology for advanced AR/VR applications. However, training ET models for every new ET device is challenging: real data collection is costly and time-consuming, while existing synthetic data generation methods lack realism. To remove the need for additional data collection while maintaining data quality, we introduce a data-driven 3D prior that models the distribution of human eyes across diverse identities, gaze directions, and light settings. This model, which we coin GazePrior, then enables sparse-input 3D reconstruction of annotated data collected with previous ET devices, which can in turn be rendered from the cameras of any target ET device. Our approach synthesizes data with the realism, diversity and ground-truth accuracy of real data collection without its prohibitive costs. Our experiments demonstrate that ET models trained with our synthesized data outperform previous zero-shot methods, achieving higher accuracy and robustness.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: eye tracking for AR/VR, gaze-based interaction
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向AR/VR的眼动追踪，基于注视的交互
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向AR/VR的眼动追踪，基于注视的交互
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向AR/VR的眼动追踪，基于注视的交互
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: GazePrior introduces a data-driven 3D prior for human eyes to enable zero-shot eye tracking across devices, reducing the need for costly data collection while maintaining realism and diversity. It directly supports gaze-based HCI by improving eye tracking accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前AR/VR眼动追踪模型需要针对每台设备收集大量真实数据，成本高且耗时。GazePrior提出了一种数据驱动的三维人眼先验模型，该模型学习不同身份、注视方向和光照条件下的眼睛分布，能够从已有设备标注数据中重建稀疏输入的3D眼睛，并渲染到任意目标设备相机的视角，实现零样本眼动追踪。实验表明，该方法合成数据质量高，提升了跨设备眼动追踪的准确性和泛化能力。该工作为注视交互提供了低成本、高精度的眼动追踪方案，直接支持基于注视的人机交互研究。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前AR/VR眼动追踪模型需要针对每台设备收集大量真实数据，成本高且耗时。GazePrior提出了一种数据驱动的三维人眼先验模型，该模型学习不同身份、注视方向和光照条件下的眼睛分布，能够从已有设备标注数据中重建稀疏输入的3D眼睛，并渲染到任意目标设备相机的视角，实现零样本眼动追踪。实验表明，该方法合成数据质量高，提升了跨设备眼动追踪的准确性和泛化能力。该工作为注视交互提供了低成本、高精度的眼动追踪方案，直接支持基于注视的人机交互研究。

deep_dive.title: Intent Signal Theory: A Computational Framework for Intent-State Control in Human-AI Interaction
deep_dive.abstract: Current AI interaction models treat the prompt as the primary object of exchange, omitting a critical layer: the user's latent source intent, the goal state preceding and motivating the prompt. Here we introduce Intent Signal Theory (IST), a computational framework that formalises this missing intent layer. IST distinguishes four objects routinely conflated: latent source intent (I*), observable intent proxy (I-hat), encoded carrier (P), and model output (O). It formalises dimensional weights, encoding masks, structural and fidelity recovery scores, and public-private intent decomposition. The Theorem of Irreversible Intent Loss establishes that private intent absent from the carrier cannot be recovered beyond generic substitution. Evidence from four companion studies spanning six LLMs, three languages and three task domains shows structural-fidelity splits, human-validated metric dissociation, and weight-tolerance plateaus consistent with IST's predictions. IST reframes prompt engineering as intent-protocol design and identifies a computational layer that current AI systems lack.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: formalizes intent-state control in human-AI interaction with Intent Signal Theory, directly relevant to multimodal intent prediction and proactive systems
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过意图信号理论形式化人机交互中的意图状态控制，直接相关于多模态意图预测和前瞻性系统
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过意图信号理论形式化人机交互中的意图状态控制，直接相关于多模态意图预测和前瞻性系统
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过意图信号理论形式化人机交互中的意图状态控制，直接相关于多模态意图预测和前瞻性系统
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Intent Signal Theory provides a computational framework distinguishing latent source intent, observable intent proxy, encoded carrier, and model output; it formalizes structural and fidelity recovery scores for intent-state control in HAI.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前AI交互模型忽略用户潜在源意图这一关键层，导致意图理解不完整。本文提出意图信号理论（IST），严格区分潜在源意图、可观察意图代理、编码载体和模型输出，形式化维度权重、编码掩码和结构恢复分数，并建立不可逆意图损失定理。该框架为多模态意图预测和前瞻性系统提供了坚实的计算基础，有助于实现更准确且隐私感知的人机交互。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前AI交互模型忽略用户潜在源意图这一关键层，导致意图理解不完整。本文提出意图信号理论（IST），严格区分潜在源意图、可观察意图代理、编码载体和模型输出，形式化维度权重、编码掩码和结构恢复分数，并建立不可逆意图损失定理。该框架为多模态意图预测和前瞻性系统提供了坚实的计算基础，有助于实现更准确且隐私感知的人机交互。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 人类意图识别与人机交互（HCI）：基于多模态信号（特别是眼动追踪）的实时意图预测与交互范式研究。probabilistic modeling（概率建模）或 proactive interaction（前瞻性交互）, especially work that connects or combines: multimodal intent prediction eye movement; gaze-based human-computer interaction; eye tracking intention recognition; real-time intent recognition algorithms; real time human intent recognition using eye tracking data; gaze based interaction paradigms for proactive system response; computational models for understanding human goals through eye movements; probabilistic modeling of human gaze for proactive systems.

deep_dive.title: Enhancing Gaze Reasoning in Vision Foundation Models for Gaze Following
deep_dive.abstract: Gaze following requires both scene understanding and gaze reasoning to localize the gaze target of an in-scene person. Recently, vision foundation models (VFMs) have demonstrated strong performance on this task, enabling simpler architectures while outperforming prior methods. However, we observe a key limitation of VFM-based approaches: while VFMs substantially improve scene understanding, they contribute little to gaze reasoning. As a result, existing methods often rely on semantically salient objects rather than true gaze cues, leading to degraded performance when targets are not salient. To address this, we propose a novel training mechanism to enhance gaze reasoning in VFMs for gaze following. Our method includes: (1) a head-conditioned local LoRA, which enables localized adaptation to preserve scene token learning while improving head token learning for gaze reasoning; and (2) an out-of-cone penalty, which injects gaze cues into head tokens while aligning them with scene tokens. Experiments on the GazeFollow and VAT datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with particularly strong improvements when gaze targets are not semantically salient. Our findings offer valuable insights for advancing future gaze following research. We will release the code once the paper is accepted.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: enhances gaze reasoning for gaze following
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 增强注视推理用于注视跟随
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 增强注视推理用于注视跟随
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 增强注视推理用于注视跟随
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a training mechanism to enhance gaze reasoning in vision foundation models for gaze following, addressing over-reliance on saliency.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前视觉基础模型在注视跟随任务中主要提升场景理解，但缺乏真正的注视推理能力，在非显著目标上表现不佳。本文提出头部条件局部LoRA等训练机制，增强模型对注视线索的推理能力。实验表明该方法在多个数据集上提升了注视跟随准确率，特别是在低显著目标场景中优势明显。该工作推动了注视分析与主动交互系统的发展。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前视觉基础模型在注视跟随任务中主要提升场景理解，但缺乏真正的注视推理能力，在非显著目标上表现不佳。本文提出头部条件局部LoRA等训练机制，增强模型对注视线索的推理能力。实验表明该方法在多个数据集上提升了注视跟随准确率，特别是在低显著目标场景中优势明显。该工作推动了注视分析与主动交互系统的发展。

deep_dive.title: MambaGaze: Bidirectional Mamba with Explicit Missing Data Modeling for Cognitive Load Assessment from Eye-Gaze Tracking Data
deep_dive.abstract: Real-time cognitive load assessment from eye-tracking signals could potentially enable adaptive human-centered-AI such as safety-critical applications such as driver vigilance monitoring or automated flight deck assistance, yet two challenges persist: handling frequent data missingness from blinks and tracking failures, and efficiently modeling long-range temporal dependencies. We propose MambaGaze, a framework that addresses these challenges through 1) XMD encoding, which augments raw features with observation masks and time-deltas to explicitly model data uncertainty, and 2) bidirectional Mamba-2, which captures temporal dependencies with linear computational complexity. Experiments on CLARE and CL-Drive datasets under leave-one-subject-out evaluation show that MambaGaze achieves 76.8% and 73.1% accuracy, respectively, outperforming CNN, Transformer, ResNet, and VGG baselines by 4-12 percentage points. Edge deployment benchmarks on NVIDIA Jetson platforms demonstrate real-time inference at 43-68 FPS with power consumption below 7.5W, confirming feasibility for wearable cognitive load monitoring.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: real-time cognitive load assessment from eye-gaze tracking data
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 从眼动追踪数据实时评估认知负荷

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: MambaGaze uses bidirectional Mamba-2 with explicit missing data modeling for real-time cognitive load assessment from eye-gaze data, aligning with real-time intent recognition using eye tracking.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该工作针对眼动信号中的缺失数据和长时依赖问题，提出MambaGaze框架，采用XMD编码显式建模数据不确定性，双向Mamba-2以线性复杂度捕捉时间依赖。在CLARE等数据集上实现实时认知负荷评估，验证了眼动数据用于实时状态推断的可行性，与基于眼动的人类意图识别目标一致。

deep_dive.title: OmniGF: A Dual-Branch Vision-Language Framework for Unified Gaze Following
deep_dive.abstract: Understanding human gaze behavior is essential for complex scene comprehension and human-computer interaction. Traditional gaze following models are typically restricted to pure spatial localization, lacking the high-level capacity to reason about semantic targets or complex social contexts. Furthermore, these models often process individuals sequentially, requiring redundant computations over the same scene image for multi-person inference. While recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer the exceptional semantic reasoning needed to address gaze-related semantic tasks, their reliance on discrete text generation inherently limits precision in continuous spatial tasks like gaze localization. To bridge this gap, we propose OmniGF, a unified vision-language framework that adapts foundational VLMs for highly scalable multi-person gaze reasoning. The model adopts a dual-branch decoding strategy: a structured language branch generates discrete reasoning states, while a continuous spatial branch directly taps into the VLM's dense hidden states. Supervising these extracted representations with high-resolution gaze target heatmaps effectively overcomes the spatial bottleneck of text-only coordinate generation. Furthermore, to explicitly ground the model in multi-person scenes, we augment the input with head embeddings encoded from cropped head images, providing fine-grained appearance and orientation cues for all individuals simultaneously. By modeling all individuals and leveraging the strong semantic capability of VLMs, OmniGF seamlessly integrates precise spatial gaze target estimation, semantic gaze prediction, and complex social gaze reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework establishes new state-of-the-art performance across multiple standard benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/cvlab-stonybrook/omnigf.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: gaze following for HCI, uses VLMs for semantic reasoning
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 注视跟随用于人机交互，利用视觉语言模型进行语义推理
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 注视跟随用于人机交互，利用视觉语言模型进行语义推理
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 注视跟随用于人机交互，利用视觉语言模型进行语义推理
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: OmniGF unifies spatial and semantic gaze following via a dual-branch VLM, enabling multi-person inference and semantic target reasoning.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对传统注视跟随模型仅能做空间定位、缺乏语义推理能力且多人场景计算冗余的问题，提出OmniGF统一框架，采用双分支视觉语言模型，同时支持精确的注视点定位和语义目标推理。在多个基准上取得最优结果，为基于注视的人机交互提供了更智能的方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对传统注视跟随模型仅能做空间定位、缺乏语义推理能力且多人场景计算冗余的问题，提出OmniGF统一框架，采用双分支视觉语言模型，同时支持精确的注视点定位和语义目标推理。在多个基准上取得最优结果，为基于注视的人机交互提供了更智能的方案。

quick_skim.title: Learning to See Like Humans: Gaze-Aligned Cycling Safety Prediction
quick_skim.abstract: Cycling delivers significant public-health and environmental benefits, yet its uptake in cities is often limited by perceived safety. When street environments appear unsafe, individuals are less likely to cycle, making perception a key barrier to adoption. Recent work has shown that pairwise comparisons of street-view images provide a scalable way to learn subjective safety judgments. However, existing approaches do not explicitly model human visual attention, which plays a central role in how humans perceive safety. We propose an Eye-Tracking-Guided Perceived Cycling Safety framework (EG-PCS) that integrates gaze data into a pairwise learning pipeline based on vision transformers. By supervising the model's attention mechanism with eye-tracking signals, we encourage alignment between learned attention maps and human fixation patterns. Experiments show that gaze-guided models achieve similar ranking performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches while producing attention maps that more accurately reflect human visual attention behavior. Our results demonstrate that incorporating eye-tracking information enhances both predictive accuracy and interpretability in perception-based urban analytics.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: integrates eye-tracking signals into vision transformer for gaze-aligned safety prediction, relevant to gaze-based HCI
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 将眼动追踪信号集成到视觉Transformer中实现视线对齐的安全预测，与基于视线的人机交互相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 将眼动追踪信号集成到视觉Transformer中实现视线对齐的安全预测，与基于视线的人机交互相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 将眼动追踪信号集成到视觉Transformer中实现视线对齐的安全预测，与基于视线的人机交互相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: EG-PCS integrates human gaze data into a vision transformer-based pairwise learning pipeline for cycling safety prediction, improving perceived safety estimation by aligning model attention with human visual attention.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有骑行安全感知预测方法未显式建模人类视觉注意力，导致预测与真实感知存在偏差。本文提出EG-PCS框架，将眼动追踪信号作为注意力监督信号，引导视觉Transformer关注人类注视区域。实验表明，融入视线信息后模型对骑行安全的主观判断更符合人类感知，验证了视线引导机制在感知建模中的有效性，为基于视线的人机交互提供了新范式。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有骑行安全感知预测方法未显式建模人类视觉注意力，导致预测与真实感知存在偏差。本文提出EG-PCS框架，将眼动追踪信号作为注意力监督信号，引导视觉Transformer关注人类注视区域。实验表明，融入视线信息后模型对骑行安全的主观判断更符合人类感知，验证了视线引导机制在感知建模中的有效性，为基于视线的人机交互提供了新范式。

quick_skim.title: MM-Conv: A Multimodal Dataset and Benchmark for Context-Aware Grounding in 3D Dialogue
quick_skim.abstract: Grounding language in the physical world requires AI systems to interpret references that emerge dynamically during conversation. While current vision-language models (VLMs) excel at static image tasks, they struggle to resolve ambiguous expressions in spontaneous, multi-turn dialogue. We address this gap by introducing (1) a benchmark for referential communication in dynamic 3D environments, built from 6.7 hours of egocentric VR interaction with synchronized speech, motion, gaze, and 3D scene geometry, and (2) a two-stage grounding pipeline that explicitly resolves conversational ambiguity before visual localization. The benchmark includes over 4,200 manually verified referring expressions spanning full, partitive, and pronominal types. Our contextual rewriting approach improves grounding performance by 11-22 percentage points on average, with a pure detector (GroundingDINO) reaching 56.7% on pronominals after rewriting, nearly double the best end-to-end baseline. Results demonstrate that decoupling linguistic reasoning from visual perception is more effective than end-to-end approaches for conversational grounding.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multimodal dataset with gaze for context-aware grounding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 包含注视的多模态数据集用于上下文感知接地

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces MM-Conv, a multimodal benchmark with synchronized gaze, speech, motion, and 3D geometry for referential communication in VR, plus a two-stage grounding pipeline.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有AI系统难以处理动态对话中的模糊指代。本文构建了一个包含6.7小时VR沉浸式交互数据（同步语音、运动、注视和3D场景几何）的多模态基准MM-Conv，并设计了一个两阶段接地流程，先解决对话歧义再进行视觉定位。该基准包含4200多个指代表达，涵盖完整、部分和代词类型。此工作为动态3D环境中的上下文感知交互提供了重要资源。

quick_skim.title: Semi-Supervised Gaze Estimation via Disentangled Subspace Contrastive Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Appearance-based gaze estimation always suffers from poor generalization due to limited annotated samples and insufficient dataset diversity. Leading approaches adopt weakly supervised learning to generate large-scale pseudo-labeled data from unconstrained real-world scenarios, aiming to mitigate the domain shifts. In this work, we devise a simple yet effective semi-supervised learning architecture that leverages unlabeled data to enhance domain generalization, thereby reducing reliance on labor-intensive manual annotations. Our key insight is to impose Jacobian regularization to disentangle feature representations into discriminative subspaces dedicated to specific gaze components, such as pitch and yaw angles. We further exploit the intrinsic ordinal ranking within each subspace for contrastive learning, enabling the model to learn robust gaze representations from a small set of labeled samples and an abundance of unlabeled ones. This ultimately yields our Disentangled Subspace Contrastive Learning (DSCL) framework. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks verify that the proposed DSCL is plug-and-play, achieving competitive performance using only 20\%, 10\%, and even 5\% of the annotated data under both in-domain and cross-domain evaluation settings. The public code is available at \href{https://github.com/da60266/DSCL}{https://github.com/da60266/DSCL}.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 半监督注视估计用于人机交互

quick_skim.title: GazeBehavior Annotation Toolkit (GBAT): AI-powered toolkit for automatic annotation of egocentric eye-tracking and video data of child-caregiver interaction
quick_skim.abstract: Video recordings of child-caregiver interactions enable investigation of attentional dynamics during naturalistic behavior. Such multimodal recording also allows researchers to examine how attention interacts with action and language use in real time. However, manual annotation of such data is time-consuming. Here, we introduce GazeBehavior Annotation Toolkit, a deep-learning-based toolkit designed to facilitate three key processes in data preprocessing and feature extraction: post-hoc synchronization across multiple videos, semi-automatic annotation of gaze target categories, and categorization of participants' poses and hand actions. This toolkit improves the efficiency and scalability of feature extraction from human egocentric eye-tracking and video data. Such improvement is critical in supporting large-scale and longitudinal investigations of attentional dynamics and naturalistic behavior in human early development.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: provides automated annotation toolkit for egocentric eye-tracking data, facilitating gaze-based HCI research
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提供了用于自我中心眼动追踪数据的自动标注工具包，有助于基于视线的人机交互研究

quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提供了用于自我中心眼动追踪数据的自动标注工具包，有助于基于视线的人机交互研究
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: GBAT is a deep-learning toolkit that automates synchronization, gaze target annotation, and pose categorization from egocentric video, enabling efficient preprocessing for gaze-based HCI.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有手动标注自我中心视频数据耗时费力，限制了注意力动态研究。本文提出GBAT，一款基于深度学习的工具包，自动完成多视频同步、注视目标半自动标注以及姿态和手部动作分类。该工具大幅提升数据预处理效率，支持实时注视分析与交互行为研究，为人机交互中理解注意力机制提供了可扩展的自动化解决方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有手动标注自我中心视频数据耗时费力，限制了注意力动态研究。本文提出GBAT，一款基于深度学习的工具包，自动完成多视频同步、注视目标半自动标注以及姿态和手部动作分类。该工具大幅提升数据预处理效率，支持实时注视分析与交互行为研究，为人机交互中理解注意力机制提供了可扩展的自动化解决方案。

quick_skim.title: Quantifying uncertainty in drift diffusion models of decision making under temporal dependence and parameter variability
quick_skim.abstract: Decision-making behavior changes over time, exhibiting temporal correlation and nonstationarity. Existing drift diffusion model (DDM) fitting methods either do not provide uncertainty quantification for parameter estimates, or rely on restrictive assumptions that decisions are independent and that parameters remain constant over time, potentially underestimating uncertainty. To address these limitations, we propose a computationally efficient method for estimating analytic uncertainties in DDM parameters that are robust to temporal dependence and unmodeled parameter variability, while explicitly modeling nonstationary variability through covariates. We apply this method to rat decision-making in a two-alternative forced-choice (2AFC) visual task, revealing dynamic decision-making states across multiple timescales. A Python implementation of the method is provided.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: probabilistic modeling of decision-making, uncertainty quantification
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 决策的概率建模，不确定性量化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 决策的概率建模，不确定性量化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 决策的概率建模，不确定性量化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a computationally efficient method for uncertainty quantification in drift diffusion models (DDM) that accounts for temporal dependence and parameter variability, offering a probabilistic modeling framework applicable to gaze-based intent prediction.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有漂移扩散模型（DDM）拟合方法缺乏对时间依赖和参数波动的不确定性量化，可能低估估计误差。本文提出一种计算高效的方法，利用协变量显式建模非平稳参数变化，获得稳健的分析型不确定性估计，并将其应用于大鼠决策数据。该方法为概率建模领域贡献了通用工具，可直接迁移至人类视线意图预测中的概率模型不确定性评估与主动交互决策。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有漂移扩散模型（DDM）拟合方法缺乏对时间依赖和参数波动的不确定性量化，可能低估估计误差。本文提出一种计算高效的方法，利用协变量显式建模非平稳参数变化，获得稳健的分析型不确定性估计，并将其应用于大鼠决策数据。该方法为概率建模领域贡献了通用工具，可直接迁移至人类视线意图预测中的概率模型不确定性评估与主动交互决策。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: probabilistic modeling of human gaze for proactive systems

quick_skim.title: Anticipate and Learn: Unleashing Idle-Time Compute in Proactive Agents
quick_skim.abstract: While AI agents demonstrate remarkable capabilities in reasoning and tool use, they remain fundamentally reactive: they compute responses only after explicit user prompts. This paradigm ignores a critical opportunity: the idle time between interactions is largely wasted, leaving agents unable to prepare for future user needs. To bridge this gap, we introduce ProAct, a proactive agent architecture that leverages idle-time compute to anticipate and fulfill likely upcoming user needs. By analyzing evolving dialogue history together with persistent memory, ProAct predicts upcoming needs and iteratively acquires information, allowing the agent to resolve knowledge gaps and prepare evidence before the user initiates a query.To rigorously evaluate proactive capabilities, we also introduce ProActEval, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 200 scenarios across 40 domains, featuring predictable need chains and diverse user cognitive profiles. Empirical results demonstrate significant advantages over reactive baselines. ProAct accelerates task completion by reducing required turns by 14.8%, decreases user effort by 11.7%, and cuts hallucination rates by 28.1% on ProActEval. Furthermore, MemBench evaluations confirm that ProAct achieves state-of-the-art reflective accuracy, underscoring its sustained and robust performance.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: proactive agent architecture anticipating user needs during idle time
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 前瞻性代理架构在空闲时间预测用户需求
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 前瞻性代理架构在空闲时间预测用户需求
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 前瞻性代理架构在空闲时间预测用户需求
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ProAct introduces a proactive agent that leverages idle-time compute to anticipate and fulfill user needs, directly relevant to gaze-based interaction paradigms for proactive system response.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该工作提出ProAct前瞻性代理架构，利用交互间隙的计算资源预测用户即将到来的需求，并主动获取信息。其与基于注视的主动系统响应范式高度一致，尽管未使用眼动数据，但为眼动驱动的前瞻性交互提供了通用的主动框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该工作提出ProAct前瞻性代理架构，利用交互间隙的计算资源预测用户即将到来的需求，并主动获取信息。其与基于注视的主动系统响应范式高度一致，尽管未使用眼动数据，但为眼动驱动的前瞻性交互提供了通用的主动框架。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: gaze based interaction paradigms for proactive system response

quick_skim.title: Real-time tracking of pupil-phase fluctuations reveals state-dependent modulation of temporal attentional capacity
quick_skim.abstract: Pupil diameter is widely used as an index of arousal and brain state, yet it remains unclear whether slow pupil-linked state fluctuations systematically modulate the effective capacity of temporal attention. Here, we tested this question using an auditory attentional blink paradigm, in which participants were required to detect the first (T1) and second (T2) targets. In Experiment 1, trial-by-trial analyses revealed that successful T2 detection, given correct T1 detection (T2|T1), was associated with smaller baseline pupil size. Furthermore, analyses focusing on slow pupil fluctuations (< 0.2 Hz) revealed that the T2|T1 detection accuracy increased during the pupil dilation phase occurring 0-2 seconds after pupil constriction. In Experiment 2, we used real-time pupillometry to trigger stimulus presentation during predefined phases of ongoing slow pupil dynamics. This closed-loop manipulation produced reliable phase-dependent differences in T2|T1 detection accuracy. Critically, the effect of pupil phase remained significant in a linear mixed-effects model that included baseline pupil size as a covariate, indicating that it cannot be explained by baseline pupil size alone. Together, these findings demonstrate that temporal attentional capacity is shaped not only by arousal level but also by the phase of slow pupil-linked brain-state fluctuations. Our results suggest that the attentional blink reflects a dynamically regulated, state-dependent limitation rather than a fixed processing bottleneck.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: real-time pupil tracking for attention, relevant to intent recognition
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 实时瞳孔追踪用于注意力研究，与意图识别相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 实时瞳孔追踪用于注意力研究，与意图识别相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 实时瞳孔追踪用于注意力研究，与意图识别相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper uses real-time pupil-phase fluctuation tracking to reveal state-dependent modulation of temporal attention capacity, providing a method for real-time physiological signal analysis that can be integrated into gaze-based intent recognition systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 时间注意力容量是否受缓慢瞳孔状态波动调节尚不明确。本研究通过听觉注意瞬脱范式，实时追踪瞳孔相位波动，发现瞳孔缓慢扩张相位（0-2秒）与目标检测正确率呈正相关，揭示了状态依赖的时间注意调制。该实时追踪方法可应用于眼动意图识别中作为用户状态估计的生理信号源，提升意图预测的准确性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 时间注意力容量是否受缓慢瞳孔状态波动调节尚不明确。本研究通过听觉注意瞬脱范式，实时追踪瞳孔相位波动，发现瞳孔缓慢扩张相位（0-2秒）与目标检测正确率呈正相关，揭示了状态依赖的时间注意调制。该实时追踪方法可应用于眼动意图识别中作为用户状态估计的生理信号源，提升意图预测的准确性。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: real time human intent recognition using eye tracking data
